name: entra-remove-user-mfa-methods
title: Remove MFA Authentication Methods for Users
shortDescription: Removes MFA authentication methods (phone, Microsoft Authenticator, software OATH token) for all or specific users in a Microsoft 365 tenant using Microsoft Graph PowerShell.
longDescription: This script connects to Microsoft Graph and removes multi-factor authentication (MFA) methods for users in a Microsoft 365 tenant. It supports two modes: removing MFA for all users in the tenant (except excluded accounts), or targeting specific users only using the -TargetUsers parameter. Admin and other accounts can be protected via the -ExcludedUsers parameter.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Remove MFA Authentication Methods for Users
